name: Ailite Dry Cabinet GP5-35L
description: AILITE Dry Cabinet is a special tool or cabinet box that can be used as a storage medium for your photography equipment such as camera bodies, lenses, batteries, filters, vertical grips, flashes and many more.

features.Key Features :: INSIDE: 285x280x430mm | OUTSIDE: 310x310x480mm | CAPACITY: 35 Liters | POWER: 5W | DRAWERS: 3 Drawers | HUMIDITY CONTROL RANGE: RH25~65% Semi-Conductor Dehumidifier | TOUCHSCREEN DISPLAY HUMIDITY HYGROMETER & CONTROL PANEL
